arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham push for Dortmund ace over expensive Eze
arts.sum: The 28-year-old, known for his technical ability and creativity, has traditionally been deployed as a central midfielder or attacking playmaker during his time with Dortmund and Bayer Leverkuse, while he has played on both wings before, and even as a false nine.
